All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

L

labWinOrLost - Variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.PauseController
Label displaying the win or lose message based on the game outcome.
lblLevel - Variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.GameController
Label displaying the player's current level.
lblLevelsResult - Variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.PauseController
Label displaying the number of levels completed by the player.
lblLevelText - Variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.GameController
Label displaying the "LEVEL" text descriptor.
lblPopUp - Variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.GameController
Label used to display popup feedback messages on correct or incorrect answers.
lblSecText - Variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.GameController
Label displaying the "SEC" text next to the timer.
lblTimer - Variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.GameController
Label displaying the remaining time in MM.SS format.
lblTimeResult - Variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.PauseController
Label displaying the remaining time when the game ended.
lblTimerText - Variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.GameController
Label displaying the timer text descriptor.
lblWord - Variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.GameController
Label displaying the word the player must type.
level - Variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.GameController
Current player level.
level - Static variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.utilities.GameData
The level reached by the player when the game ended.
loadWords() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.GameModel
Loads the full word list into memory and shuffles it randomly.
loadWords() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.model.GameModelAdapter
Loads the full word list into memory and shuffles it randomly.
loadWords() - Method in interface com.example.escriturarapida.model.IGameModel
Loads the full word list into memory and shuffles it randomly.
